name: Crockpot Brunswick Stew-pjxg05a 1i27
recipeIngredient: 1 package Frozen succotash or 1 pkg. frozen okra, sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. In the crockpot, stir together undrained tomatoes and tomato paste.
2. Add cooked chicken, frozen succotash or sliced okra, chopped onions, bay leaf, salt, rosemary, pepper, and ground cloves.
3. Stir in chicken broth. Cover.
4. Cook on low heat setting for 5 to 6 hours.
5. Before serving, remove the bay leaf and stir well.
6. Makes 6 servings. Judy Garnett/NC PJXG05A
